name: Mohamed Elsaka
about: I'm Mohamed Elsaka, a full stack developer based in Cairo with 2 years of hands-on experience building production-grade web applications. I work across the entire stack — crafting accessible, performant React and Next.js interfaces on the frontend, and designing scalable Node.js, Express and NestJS APIs backed by PostgreSQL and MongoDB on the backend. I care deeply about clean architecture, readable code, and shipping products that are fast by default.
